reviews.review_description: OK game , need more targets,  moving or stationary objects to aim for , eg balloon  , running small animals,  battles,  beer cans,  light bulbs to shoot at . Allows player to place the targets any where in the room.  Allow time option 1 ,  3 , or 5 minutes or endless gameplay to test your aim and to get  higher score .

developer_response.body: Thankyou for your feedback and suggestions.  At this time we are focusing on delivering a true simulation of the game of Darts.  We will be adding further variety in a future update to allow players to play well know Dart games, such as "Around the clock", "Hare and Hounds", and "Cricket".

reviews.review_description: How do I throw the darts. On occulus quest 2. Can pick darts up but won't release.

developer_response.body:
Sorry for your troubles, let's see if we can help you out.  Once you have picked up the darts with either hand using the GRIP button they will remain in your hand.  You can switch hands by placing your hands close together and pressing the GRIP button on the controller of the empty hand.

To select and then throw a dart do the following.  Move you empty hand very close to one of the darts you are holding in the other hand.  Then press and hold the TRIGGER button.  This will perform a pinch gesture holding the dart.  Throw that dart as you would a real dart, releasing the TRIGGER button to release the dart.

Please let us know if this resolves your issue.  We are soon releasing a small update which we hope will help relieve some confusion.

reviews.review_title: One of the most realistic for practicing
reviews.review_description: Played a few darts games, and this hasn’t got a little dot to throw it at, or a trajectory line. There’s no real of making sure you’re standing at the right distance, apart from looking down at the oche (not sure if there’s a way to show it). Takes a bit of getting use to but it’s one of the games I always go back to for a quick couple of 501’s. Not played the multiplayer (which is why 4 stars) so don’t know if it works. Good for practicing maths and finishes.

Found the throwing mechanism easy to ‘pick up’ and use, and as a relative novice, it seems pretty accurate. Couple of suggestions from my short time playing:
1) as already said, the ability to play a random person would be good (I don’t have any friends on Quest)
2) the ability to raise the board height: when you’re stood right in front of it, it could be higher (on a real board, I believe the bullseye is about 5 feet 8” high (which is a couple of inches taller than me). It would make the game more accurate
3) similarly, whilst there is a floor marker, perhaps the equivalent of the standard throwing distance as an auto setting (7 feet 9 and a quarter inches is the most used distance I believe)
4) I liked the room but found it slightly disconcerting to still hear voices when it’s empty! Perhaps different venues, such as playing in front of an actual crowd?
5) I have only played a short while, so it may already be part of the game, but rebounds if a dart hits the wire would add to the realism. 

Sorry for being picky, a really good start but some improvements would make it top notch.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your suggestions, we will certainly be looking to include improvements in future updates.  Regarding the board height, it should be sitting at the correct height, but we'll certainly double check.

reviews.review_description: Great dart game , but when trying to play multi-player it is saying no internet connection when I know I have just played multi-player on other games? Can you look into this i love this game and want to play with my friends  good job !

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.  We are aware of the bug you mentioned and it will be fixed in next update.  Our testing indicates that the online multiplayer will still work, simply ignore the message.

reviews.review_description: Cant play with a friend even if we write the same room name and if we leave the room the game freeze ,i reach out to the developpers but still nothing

developer_response.body: Very sorry for this experience. An update is coming in December that will resolve this situation.

reviews.review_description:
It was difficult to figure out how to throw the darts and hit the target at first, but after practice it got much easier.   I'd like to see more dart games added along with 501.  

I'd also like to see other dart fins to choose from. Possibly other locations to play in. It would be cool to have famous backgrounds.  
Cheers TV show, the Winchester from Shawn of the dead, or other famous pubs & bars.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback.  We will be releasing updates soon that will include new game types.  Different bars to play in is a fantastic suggestion.

reviews.review_description: Worked out how to throw after about 30 mins and wish I hadn't bothered.  Nothing like the physics of throwing a dart

developer_response.body:
We're very sorry to hear that you did not enjoy the experience.  We'll soon begin releasing updates, and hope you'll take the time to try the experience again.

If you have any suggestions for how we might improve the experience we'd be very happy to consider them

reviews.review_description:
Before reading the previous review I was going to suggest adding more games (i.e. cricket, baseball, etc.)
A cool feature might be having the ability to customize the dart flights and maybe be able to play against other people you don't know. 
Besides the above suggestions, I think it's a great game and the developers have a good thing going with the endless possibilities. 
Congratulations on a good game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback.  We hope to have the first of our updates releasing soon.  

Customise your darts?  What a fantastic idea.

reviews.review_title: Almost perfect. Three easy things to add
reviews.review_description:
Game is ok and feeling of dart game is accurate.
Missing three things it's for hot sitt competition @ friends meeting in real.
1 - counter of average 
2 - counter of turns to clear 501
3 - scoreboard for local multiplayer.

Description: at beginning of game each player type a names on grenboard for 2+ players and each player try to clear 501, after clean, on greenboard results will be shown in 2 numbers average and number of turns, and next player can try to beat the score. Highest Score can be saved :) name and date of achieve.
So in result you will have universal game for single player, multiplayer local and multiplayer over net.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review, and your wonderful suggestions for improvement.  We'll be releasing numerous updates.  These will include new game types, improved accessibility and more.  We will certainly look to incorporate your suggestions.  I love the idea of an average hand score, and turn/dart counter.
